pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade the Kotlin compiler and standard library to version 2.0.0.
Change the Kotlin compiler's JVM target from 1.8 to 17 to ensure bytecode compatibility with the new Java baseline.
Replace the generic kotlin-test dependency with kotlin-test-junit5 to use JUnit 5 as the test runner.
Update the Ktor HTTP client library to a newer patch version.
Upgrade the Maven Assembly Plugin to a newer version.
Upgrade the Maven GPG Plugin to a newer version.
Upgrade the Maven JAR Plugin to a newer version.
Upgrade the Maven Release Plugin to a newer version.
Upgrade the Maven Source Plugin to a newer version.
Upgrade the Nexus Staging Maven Plugin to a newer version.

.github/workflows/build.yml.general_idea: Update the checkout action to version 4 for improved performance and security.
Update the setup-java action to version 4 to support newer JDK distributions and features.
Change the CI environment to use JDK 17 instead of JDK 13.
Explicitly specify Temurin as the JDK distribution provider.
Replace manual cache configuration with the built-in caching feature of setup-java.
Remove the explicit actions/cache step as it is now handled by setup-java.

.github/workflows/codeql.yml.general_idea: Update workflow triggers to listen to the 'main' branch instead of 'master' to align with repository renaming.
Upgrade the checkout action from version 3 to version 4 to use the latest stable release.

.github/workflows/publish.yml.general_idea: Enable manual triggering of the publish workflow via the GitHub UI.
Update the checkout action to version 4 for better performance and support.
Update the setup-java action to version 4 to support newer JDKs and features.
Change the build environment from JDK 13 to JDK 17 as part of the Java version migration.
Replace the explicit cache action with the built-in caching feature of setup-java v4.
.github/workflows/publish.yml.human_impl: Removed 'actions/cache@v1' step and added 'cache: maven' to setup-java inputs.
